name: Cuban Black Bean Soup (Frugal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the black beans in 2 quarts of water overnight.
2. Drain the soaked beans.
3. Add the beans and an additional gallon of water to a large pot.
4. Simmer for 5 hours.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (oregano, onions, mustard, parsley, celery) and simmer for another 2 hours, being careful not to burn the soup.
